title: Easy Flying Fish Coloring Page

seoDescription: Print this simple flying fish outline gliding over waves. Free high-res PDF.

funFacts: The flying fish can reach speeds of up to 37 mph in the water before launching themselves into the air to escape predators.
The gliding flight of the flying fish can last up to 45 seconds, using their tail fin to taxi along the water's surface.
